steps.title: Match subject and tense
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is Pomo artist Corine Pearce, a singular person. Because the sentence describes what she typically does, the verb should be a present-tense singular verb.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice A gives a gerund, leaving the sentence without the needed main verb. Choice C gives an infinitive that does not complete the sentence. Choice D gives a passive infinitive phrase, which also fails as the main verb. The answer is B.
